--- title: "DAA Taxa" --- # Differential abundance analysis ::: {.cell} ::: Analysis information: - Method: maaslin3 - Taxonomic level: species, genus, family, phylum - Group variable: diet - Formula used for interaction: **~ diet * duration + (1 | id)** - Formula used across groups: **~ diet** - Formula used within groups: **~ duration + (1 | id)** - Correction: **Benjamini-Hochberg FDR adjustment** - Detection threshold: 0.1% - Prevalence threshold: 10% ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ## Interaction Model ::: {#tbl-table-of-significant-results .cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
